headline: CVS Health declares quarterly dividend
summary: CVS Health® (NYSE: CVS) has announced that its board of directors has approved a quarterly dividend of sixty-six and one-half cents ($0.665 cents) per share on the Common Stock of the Corporation. The dividend is payable on May 4, 2026, to holders of record on April 23, 2026.

headline: Healthy Returns: Stopping GLP-1s raises risk of heart attack, stroke and death, study says
summary: Research finds that even short gaps in treatment with a GLP-1 can drive up risks of heart attack, stroke and death in patients with Type 2 diabetes.

raw.headline: Healthy Returns: Stopping GLP-1s raises risk of heart attack, stroke and death, study says
raw.summary: Research finds that even short gaps in treatment with a GLP-1 can drive up risks of heart attack, stroke and death in patients with Type 2 diabetes.

headline: CVS Health Foundation Invests $2.24 Million to Strengthen Community Health in Charlotte's Historic West End
summary: The CVS Health Foundation today announced the launch of its Health Zone in Charlotte with a $2.24 million investment in the Westside Wellness Collab, led by Local Initiatives Support Corporation (LISC) Charlotte to expand access to health care, healthy food and chronic condition support in Charlotte's Historic West End.

headline: 188-year-old NYC pharmacy has been 'packed like sardines'—all because of $40 headbands and FX's 'Love Story'
summary: Twenty-somethings are flocking to a nearly 200-year-old pharmacy in New York to buy headbands once worn by Carolyn Bessette Kennedy, the drugstore's owners say.
